name: Spicy Rice Pilaf with Turkey
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Pine nuts or chopped cashews
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the pine nuts or cashews (if using) in a dry pan until lightly browned.
2. In a saucepan, heat vegetable oil over medium heat.
3. Add rice, cumin seeds, ginger, cinnamon, cardamom seeds, and cloves to the saucepan. Stir to coat the rice evenly with the spices.
4. Cook the rice mixture for about 5 minutes until the grains are lightly browned.
5. Pour in Turkey stock or water and stir gently.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer uncovered for 45-50 minutes, or until the rice is tender and has absorbed most of the liquid.
7. Stir in raisins, chopped turkey, and pine nuts (if using).
8. Let the pilaf stand, covered, for about 10 minutes before serving hot or cold.
(Note: This recipe yields approximately a quarter of the total servings listed.)
